svg.title: FusionNetASPP revised architecture
svg.desc: Encoder on left, decoder in centre, SIC output on right. Skip connections go straight right. Frequency inputs shown merging into each encoder stage.
svg.text: Encoder — cat(prev features, raw 2-ch freq pair) → Conv → ResBlock → sN
ASPP — 1×1 branch + dilated 3×3 (rates 6,12,18) → cat → fuse → d
Decoder — cat(d, sN) → reduce (2×feat→feat) → ResBlock → d, unwinding s6→s1
Skip — encoder stage sN routed straight right to matching decoder stage
Frequency input — raw 2-ch AMSR2 pair merged into encoder at each stage
